coaching.title: Today's Run
coaching.message: You're 58 days out and in taper week 3—volume is right (17.2 mi through Wednesday), but you need vert work today to maintain alpine fitness. Run 8–10 miles with 800–1,000 ft of sustained climbing over rolling or steep terrain, keeping effort Z2–Z3 (your last run hit 125 bpm avg; aim 120–135 bpm). This isn't a threshold session; it's a reminder to your legs that mountains exist. You've recovered hard (RHR 57, 10.6h sleep, 100/100 score)—your system is primed. Don't waste this window sitting easy when you have 58 days left to sharpen.

coaching.title: Fuel Right
coaching.message: Taper is a fueling test phase for the Julian Alps. Eat 60–80g carbs in the 2 hours before this run (oats, banana, rice cakes—nothing new), and plan 30–40g carbs + electrolytes during if you're over 90 min (you will be with the vert). Post-run, nail protein + carbs within 30 min: aim 20–30g protein and 1–1.2g carbs per kg bodyweight over the next 4 hours. Your 92% sleep efficiency tells me digestion and recovery are dialed—don't break that by skipping post-run fuel.

coaching.title: Recovery
coaching.message: Your sleep volume (10.6h) is elite; 30-day average of 8.06h is solid for an ultrarunner in taper. RHR at 57 is 5 bpm below your 30-day norm—you're genuinely recovered. Use today to consolidate: no additional stressors, walk easy this evening if work permits, and aim for another 8–9 hour night. With 58 days left, sleep is non-negotiable; it's when VO2max adaptations lock in and legs rebuild. Protect 8h minimum every night through race day.

coaching.title: Mental Edge
coaching.message: You've built 26 weeks of fitness on a demanding travel schedule—respect that. Today's vert session is a confidence builder, not a fitness test. In the Julian Alps, you'll see 2,500m vert over open, exposed ridges and sparse aid; the mental game is readiness, not speed. Use this run to dial in how you climb at Z3 on tired legs (which is what race day becomes after hour 6). Notice your breathing, your cadence, your fuel triggers. You're 8 weeks from the start line; every session is reconnaissance now.
